releaseNotes:
Release v0.2.0 — First Release

Project Succession is a cross-platform pipeline automation tool built around
a visual node editor. Connect triggers and actions into workflows that run
automatically — no code required.

What's included:

Visual Editor:
- Node-based pipeline editor with drag-and-drop workflow building
- Graph search, real-time execution console, and console-to-graph navigation
- Solution container (.succsln) to organize multiple graphs
- 10 built-in example workflows to get started

Triggers:
- File system: created, modified, deleted, renamed watchers
- Interval and cron scheduling
- Webhooks with synchronous response mode

Actions:
- File operations, HTTP requests, Python scripts, AI (LLM) integration
- Data mapper, conditional branching, passthrough, environment variables
- Cloud storage: AWS S3, Google Cloud Storage, Azure Blob Storage
- Databases: PostgreSQL, MySQL, Supabase, MongoDB

3D Asset Pipeline:
- FBX 7.5 read/write, OBJ and glTF format support
- Mesh inspection: has meshes, normals, materials, UVs, metadata
- Mesh optimization via meshopt

DCC Tool Integrations:
- Blender, Maya, Houdini, Unreal Engine, Photoshop, Unity

Advanced Workflow Features:
- Subgraphs with nested workflows, for-loops, and exposed parameters
- Parameter scripting: @alias.param, @env.VAR, @secret.KEY expressions
- Multi-graph deployment: run multiple pipelines in parallel
- Cross-graph symbol indexing and alias rename

Licensing:
- Personal, Business, and Enterprise tiers via Paddle
- Monthly/yearly billing options
- Enterprise admin tools for organization management
